generatedState.trackedPolicy: fixture-scoped sample evidence may be tracked; generated runtime outputs remain ignored

scenarioTemplates.description: Declarative QA smoke template for collecting a goal and exiting without plugin-owned execution.

parameters.name: goalId
parameters.description: Local scenario goal identifier to collect.

parameters.name: difficulty
parameters.description: Fixture difficulty label for expected pacing.

validationHints: Require existing trusted scenario runner to own execution.
Record input replay and runtime probe evidence refs after trusted QA execution.
scenarioTemplates.boundary: Declarative read-only scenario template metadata only; no executable scripts, no command hooks, no network references, no source mutation hooks, no trusted writes.

boundary: Declarative plugin registry evidence only; no executable plugin runtime, no command execution, no network install, read-only dashboard and Studio display, no trusted source mutation, no publish or deploy authority.
